{"query":"INSERT INTO produktionsAnlagenConfig (intTp_ID,unt_ID, mst_ID,prd_id,anl_id,anl_col,startDate,endDate,startWeek,endWeek,ending,note,einheitControlSys,iBdeType,mstIMw,min_val,max_val) VALUES ('4', '2', '', '2071' , '1098' , 'anl03_ID' , '2019', '', '','', '1', '','4' , '1','Gas-245','10','60') "}
